title: cyperus erectus var. intercedens
intro: Cyperus erectus var. intercedens, also known as the small flowering flatsedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Cyperus erectus var. intercedens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
